chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-3051 of 2025. Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) HEARING. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.08.2025. Mr. Zeeshan Yar Muhammad Rajper, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Ali Hyder Saleem, Addl. P.G. Mr. K.A. Vaswani, AAG ************* Through this Petition, the Petitioners seek post arrest bail in FIR No.298/2025 under Section 9(i)(a) Sindh CNSA, Act, 2022 registered at P.S. Shah Faisal Colony, Karachi. Now the SCNS Act has been amended by the Government of Sindh and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and today learned AAG submits that the Governor, Sindh has assented on 15.08.2025 and only formal Notification is to be issued in the Gazette. Under such circumstances, the petitioners have an alternate remedy to approach the trial Court for bail, this Petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
